scope: Add IntegratedCodePublishSmpWorkloadRecord as first-class integrated scenario evidence
Tie S15 SmpStressRun, S12 SmpCodePublishBarrier, S11 StopTheWorldRendezvous, and S10 SmpSafePoint into one generation-checked code publish workload scenario
Require exact generations for stress run, code publish barrier, rendezvous, and safe point references
Require clean SMP stress evidence, zero property failures, observed code publish barrier evidence, and semantic code publish epoch 0->1
Require code_publish_executed=false so X7 cannot be mistaken for real SMP dynamic code publish
Emit IntegratedCodePublishSmpWorkloadRecorded event and stable osctl ViewV1 JSON
Expose historical graph edges without creating live ownership or substrate mapping truth
Publish target_executor semantic package roots and count validation for X7 evidence

implemented_contract_clauses.clause: X7 code publish while SMP workload active
all integrated code publish/SMP workload references carry kind/id/generation
integrated scenario uses Historical graph edges for stress, publish barrier, rendezvous, and safe point attribution
osctl exposes stable ViewV1 JSON and contract validation output

findings_fixed: contract graph models IntegratedCodePublishSmpWorkload as exact-generation integrated evidence
ContractGraphSnapshot now carries SmpSafePoint, StopTheWorldRendezvous, and SmpCodePublishBarrier records so X7 edges are validator-visible
target_executor writes X7 records, roots, and counts into the semantic package
osctl command, inspect, replay, and graph history expose integrated-code-publish-smp-workload evidence through stable ViewV1 JSON
semantic validation rejects missing stress evidence, stale code publish barrier generation, and integrated epoch drift
bad_smells_checked: No real SMP dynamic code publish is claimed
No W^X or page-table state became semantic truth
No target-side cwasm execution path was changed
No adapter internal structs are serialized as osctl stable views
No third-party dependency was introduced in semantic_core
residual_notes: X8 owns panic ring extraction after substrate panic
Future real code publish must feed the same semantic SmpCodePublishBarrier evidence rather than bypassing X7

validation_commands.command: cargo check -p semantic_core -p artifact_manifest -p contract_core -p target_executor -p osctl

residual_gaps: X8 owns panic ring extraction after substrate panic
Real SMP code publish must later provide runtime-backed evidence through the existing semantic objects
